title: IGNPION Seagrass Storage Basket with Lid Woven Wicker Desktop Baskets Bathroom Organiser Box, Living Room Decorative Under Shelf Box Multipurpose Storage Hamper (XL, Natural&Black)
features: Fashionable and practical-Not only keep your item tidy and organizer, also to add some natural classic and chic looking to your home from handcrafted storage box. It will be a nice decoration in every season, the natural colors will be well integrated into different styles of decoration to show your style

A with lid basket could serve multiple functions and help you classify and hide items to fit more your storage ideas and make your room more visually tidy. Well to use in the living room, guest room, hallway or in the office, shop or at the reception

Versatile organizer- Perfect for organizing and storing small items as remote, tissue, small toy, cosmetic bottles, Vitamins, chargers keys, office supplies, sewing items . It is easy to lift out, sift through and find what you want. Suitable for dressing table, shelves, desk top ,cabinet or nightstand, etc
This storage tray made of seagrass, light weight and eco-friendly. The sturdy base gives a solid structure to provide strength and durability for multi-purpose use

External Size: 40cm x 28cm x 19cm (LxWxH). As our baskets are handmade from natural materials, the baskets you receive may have a slight variance in size and color. This is a natural product and therefore, means that the weave is not going to look machine-made-perfect. Please kindly check before your purchase
We will recommend that seagrass products used in the bathroom or in more humid environments require regular exposure to the sun for regular maintenance.
description: These basket organiser is a function storage addition for your home. It's so convenient to keep your personal bits and pieces, tidying up your shelves, desk top, or whatever you need to keep safe also near to hand. Specification： Size: 40cm x 28cm x 19cm(LxWxH) Material: Seagrass Color : as picture Package includes: 1 x storage shelf basket Notice: 1.As our baskets are handmade from natural materials, the baskets you receive may have a slight variance in size and color 2.This is a natural product and therefore, means that the weave is not going to look machine-made-perfect. How to clean: a.Use a soft brush to clean the dust from the inside out. b. Wipe it clean with a damp cloth c. Dry in the sun to keep the basket dry. If used in a humid environment, dry the basket in the sun at regular intervals to keep it dry.
